name: PreferenceSettings
summary: PreferenceSettings is a class for GUI to persist certain settings. Upon running of the GUI, those settings that are persistent will be loaded from a XML file from DYNAMO_SETTINGS_FILE. When GUI is closed, the settings are saved back into the XML file.

constructors.name: PreferenceSettings()
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Dynamo.Configuration.PreferenceSettings class.

methods.name: AskForTrustedLocation(bool, bool, bool, bool, bool)
methods.signature: Dynamo.Configuration.PreferenceSettings.AskForTrustedLocationResult AskForTrustedLocation(bool isOpenedFile, bool isFileInTrustedLocation, bool isHomeSpace, bool isShowStartPage, bool isDisableTrustWarnings)

methods.name: GetIsBackgroundPreviewActive(string)
methods.summary: Returns active state of specified background preview

methods.name: GetPythonTemplateFilePath
methods.summary: Returns the static Python template file path. When the file exists and is not empty, its contents are used to populate new Python Script nodes added to the Dynamo workspace.

methods.name: IsTrustedLocation(string)
methods.summary: Checkes whether the input argument (path) is among Dynamo's trusted locations Only directories are supported. Subdirectories of a trusted directory are considered trusted.

params.name: location
params.doc: An absolute path to a folder or file on disk

returns.doc: True if the path is a trusted location, false otherwise

methods.name: Load(string)
methods.summary: Loads PreferenceSettings from specified XML file if possible, else initializes PreferenceSettings with default values.

returns.doc: Stored PreferenceSettings from xml file or Default PreferenceSettings if xml file is not found.

methods.name: LoadContent(string)
methods.summary: Loads PreferenceSettings from specified XML file if possible, else initializes PreferenceSettings with default values.

params.name: content
params.doc: The content of the xml file

methods.name: Save(string)
methods.summary: Saves PreferenceSettings to XML, given a file path.

params.name: filePath
params.doc: Path of the XML File to save to.

returns.doc: True if file is saved successfully, false if an error occurred.

methods.name: SaveInternal(string)
methods.summary: Saves PreferenceSettings in a default directory when no path is specified.

params.name: preferenceFilePath
params.doc: The file path to save preference settings to. If this parameter is null or empty string, preference settings will be saved to the default path.

returns.doc: True if file is saved successfully, false if an error occurred.

methods.name: SetIsBackgroundPreviewActive(string, bool)
methods.summary: Sets active state of specified background preview

methods.name: StaticFields
methods.summary: List of static Fields to be excluded for evaluation due to their access level

properties.name: BackgroundPreviews
properties.summary: Collection of pairs [BackgroundPreviewName;isActive]

properties.name: BackupFiles
properties.summary: A list of backup file paths.

properties.name: BackupFilesCount
properties.summary: This defines how many files will be backed up.

properties.name: BackupInterval
properties.summary: This defines how long (in milliseconds) will the graph be automatically saved.

properties.name: BackupLocation
properties.summary: Backup files path

properties.name: CollapseToMinSize
properties.summary: Indicates if the groups should be collapsed to minimal size by default.

properties.name: ConnectorType
properties.summary: The types of connector: Bezier or Polyline.

properties.name: ConsoleHeight
properties.summary: The height of the console display.

properties.name: CustomPackageFolders
properties.summary: A list of folders packages, custom nodes or direct paths to .dll and .ds files.

properties.name: DefaultEnableLegacyPolyCurveBehavior
properties.summary: PolyCurve normal and direction behavior has been made predictable in Dynamo 3.0 and has therefore changed. This defines whether legacy (pre-3.0) PolyCurve behavior is selected by default. This flag can be overridden by individual workspaces that have the EnableLegacyPolyCurveBehavior flag defined. Note: For internal use only and will be removed in a future version of Dynamo.

properties.name: DefaultNodeAutocompleteSuggestion
properties.summary: Defines the default method of the Node Autocomplete

properties.name: DefaultPythonEngine
properties.summary: Engine used by default for new Python script and string nodes. If not empty, this takes precedence over any system settings.

properties.name: DefaultRunType
properties.summary: Defines the default run type when opening a workspace

properties.name: DefaultScaleFactor
properties.summary: Default geometry scale factor for a new workspace

properties.name: DisableBuiltinPackages
properties.summary: If enabled Dynamo Built-In Packages will not be loaded.

properties.name: DisableCustomPackageLocations
properties.summary: If enabled user's custom package locations will not be loaded.

properties.name: DisableTrustWarnings
properties.summary: If true, trust warnings for opening .dyn files from untrusted locations will not be shown. Do not use this property setter, it does nothing. Exists only to support serialization.

properties.name: DynamoPlayerFolderGroups
properties.summary: Collections of folders used by individual Dynamo Player or Generative Design as entry points.

properties.name: EnableDynamoPlayerRenamedWatchAsOutput
properties.summary: Enable legacy behavior for Dynamo Player to allow renamed Watch nodes to be seen as graph output. This flag is for use in the 2024 product release year and can removed for 2025

properties.name: EnableNewNodeAutoCompleteUI
properties.summary: This allows the user to enable or disable the new node auto complete menu.

properties.name: EnableNodeAutoComplete
properties.summary: This defines if user wants to see the enabled node Auto Complete feature for port interaction.

properties.name: EnableNotificationCenter
properties.summary: This defines if user wants to see the enabled Dynamo Notification Center.

properties.name: EnablePersistExtensions
properties.summary: This defines if user wants the Extensions settings to persist across sessions.

properties.name: EnableStaticSplashScreen
properties.summary: This defines if the user wants to see the static splash screen again

properties.name: GraphChecksumItemsList
properties.summary: Return a list of GraphChecksumItems

properties.name: GraphicScaleUnit
properties.summary: Contains the currently selected unit used for scaling the graphic helpers (grids, axes)

properties.name: GridScaleFactor
properties.summary: Sets the background grid element scale

properties.name: GroupStyleItemsList
properties.summary: Stores the group styles added in the preference settings

properties.name: HideAutocompleteMethodOptions
properties.summary: If true, autocomplete method options are hidden from UI

properties.name: HideNodesBelowSpecificConfidenceLevel
properties.summary: This defines if user wants to hide the nodes below a specific confidenc level.

properties.name: HomePageSettings
properties.summary: Persistence for Dynamo HomePage

properties.name: IronPythonResolveTargetVersion
properties.summary: The Version of the IronPython package that Dynamo will download when it is found as missing in graphs.

properties.name: IsADPAnalyticsReportingApproved
properties.summary: Indicates whether ADP analytics reporting is approved or not. Note that the getter will communicate to a analytics server which might be slow. This API should only be used in UI scenarios (not in performance sensitive areas)

properties.name: IsAutoSyncDocumentBrowser
properties.summary: This defines if user wants the Document Browser content to be automatically synced to the selected Node. The default value is true.

properties.name: IsBackgroundGridVisible
properties.summary: Should the background grid be shown?

properties.name: IsCreatedFromValidFile
properties.summary: Indicates when an instance has been created from a preferences file correctly, a support property

properties.name: IsFirstRun
properties.summary: Indicates first run

properties.name: IsIronPythonDialogDisabled
properties.summary: This defines if user wants to see the Iron Python Extension Dialog box on every new session.

properties.name: IsMLAutocompleteTOUApproved
properties.summary: This defines if the user is agree to the ML Automcomplete Terms of Use

properties.name: IsTimeStampIncludedInExportFilePath
properties.summary: This defines if the user export file path would include timestamp

properties.name: LibraryWidth
properties.summary: The width of the library pane.

properties.name: LibraryZoomScale
properties.summary: Indicates the zoom scale of the library

properties.name: Locale
properties.summary: The locale of Dynamo UI, serialize locale instead of language name as ease of conversion back and forth

properties.name: MLRecommendationConfidenceLevel
properties.summary: This defines the level of confidence related to the ML recommendation.

properties.name: MLRecommendationNumberOfResults
properties.summary: This defines the number of results of the ML recommendation

properties.name: MaxNumRecentFiles
properties.summary: The maximum number of recent file paths to be saved.

properties.name: NamespacesToExcludeFromLibrary
properties.summary: Indicates (if any) which namespaces should not be displayed in the Dynamo node library. String format: "[library name]:[fully qualified namespace]"

properties.name: NamespacesToExcludeFromLibrarySpecified
properties.summary: True if the NamespacesToExcludeFromLibrary element is found in DynamoSettings.xml.

properties.name: NodeSearchTagSizeLimit
properties.summary: Limits the size of the tags used by the EntryDictionary

properties.name: NumberFormat
properties.summary: The decimal precision used to display numbers.

properties.name: OpenFileInManualExecutionMode
properties.summary: Indicates the default state of the "Open in Manual Mode" checkbox in OpenFileDialog

properties.name: OptionalInPortsCollapsed
properties.summary: Indicates if the optional input ports are collapsed by default.

properties.name: PackageDirectoriesToUninstall
properties.summary: A list of packages used by the Package Manager to determine which packages are marked for deletion.

properties.name: PackageDownloadTouAccepted
properties.summary: Indicates if the user has accepted the terms of use for downloading packages from package manager.

properties.name: PredefinedGroupStyleFontSizes
properties.summary: Return the predefined Font size values

properties.name: PythonScriptZoomScale
properties.summary: Indicates the zoom scale of the Python editor

properties.name: PythonTemplateFilePath
properties.summary: Path to the Python (.py) file to use as a starting template when creating a new PythonScript Node.

properties.name: ReadNotificationIds
properties.summary: Stores the notification ids that was read by the user

properties.name: RecentFiles
properties.summary: A list of recently opened file paths.

properties.name: RenderPrecision
properties.summary: Indicate which render precision will be used

properties.name: SelectedPackagePathForInstall
properties.summary: Currently selected package path where all packages downloaded from the Package Manager will be installed. The default package path for install is the user data directory currently used by the Dynamo environment.

properties.name: ShowCodeBlockLineNumber
properties.summary: Indicates if code block node line numbers should be displayed.

properties.name: ShowConnector
properties.summary: Should connectors be visible?

properties.name: ShowConnectorToolTip
properties.summary: Should connector tooltip be visible?

properties.name: ShowDefaultGroupDescription
properties.summary: Indicates if groups should display the default description.

properties.name: ShowDetailedLayout
properties.summary: Indicates whether show detailed or compact layout during search.

properties.name: ShowEdges
properties.summary: Indicates whether surface and solid edges will be rendered.

properties.name: ShowPreviewBubbles
properties.summary: Indicates if preview bubbles should be displayed on nodes.

properties.name: ShowPythonAutoMigrationNotifications
properties.summary: Controls whether Dynamo shows upgrade notifications for legacy CPython nodes when opening a graph. These notices appear when a graph contains CPython-engine Python nodes that are automatically upgraded to PythonNet3: • save/close confirmation dialog • banner inside the Python Script Editor NOTE: This setting is not related to the historical IronPython2 → CPython3 migration.

properties.name: ShowRunPreview
properties.summary: Show Run Preview flag.

properties.name: ShowTabsAndSpacesInScriptEditor
properties.summary: This defines if user wants to see the whitespaces and tabs in python script editor.

properties.name: TemplateFilePath
properties.summary: Template path

properties.name: TrustedLocations
properties.summary: Represents a copy of the list of trusted locations that the user added. Do not use this list to check if a new path is trusted or not. To check if a new path is trusted or not please use the IsTrustedLocation API (IsTrustedLocation supports locations)

properties.name: UnconnectedOutPortsCollapsed
properties.summary: Indicates if the unconnected output ports are hidden by default.

properties.name: UseHardwareAcceleration
properties.summary: Should Dynamo use hardware acceleration if it is supported?

properties.name: UseHostScaleUnits
properties.summary: Indicates if Host units should be used for graphic helpers for Dynamo Revit

properties.name: UseRenderInstancing
properties.summary: Indicates whether background preview use instancing when rendering geometry. be rendered.

properties.name: ViewExtensionSettings
properties.summary: Settings that apply to view extensions.

properties.name: WindowH
properties.summary: The last height of the Dynamo window.

properties.name: WindowW
properties.summary: The last width of the Dynamo window.

properties.name: WindowX
properties.summary: The last X coordinate of the Dynamo window.

properties.name: WindowY
properties.summary: The last Y coordinate of the Dynamo window.
